response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video to check for vocal music. 2. Identified the content as a cooking-focused chat segment featuring VTubers. 3. Confirmed that only background instrumental music is playing throughout the video. 4. Concluded there is no vocal music to perform a lyric lookup for. 5. Mapped the video into chronological scenes based on the cooking actions shown.
response.global_summary: A video segment featuring two VTubers chatting while preparing and garnishing a plate of "waterless spice curry". No vocal songs are performed.

scenes.description: The VTubers show a plate of waterless spice curry and discuss its appearance and ingredients while light instrumental background music plays.
The VTubers discuss and carefully add garnish, including zucchini slices, to the curry.
The VTubers add a "herb mix" garnish to the rice on the plate.
The VTubers continue discussing the dish and prepare it for eating by adding final touches to the garnish.
The VTubers express their excitement for the finished dish, ready to eat.
